rules.desc: the first line must be `// name: weather-app`
the backdrop photo comes from sys.photo (BLOCK: PHOTO-BACKDROP)
photo/map images must CropToFill (photo + satellite + basemap + airmap)
an animated WeatherIcon shows the current condition
hero temp, H/L/feels, 7-day rows, and tiles all bind sys.weather
the AIR QUALITY tile binds sys.airquality
the air map stacks sys.airmap over sys.basemap
the air map stacks sys.airmap over sys.basemap
